photos.title: James Lick Soccer Team Backstage
photos.caption: Team moment backstage during James Lick High School's Cal-Hi Sports soccer media day.
photos.alt: Group of James Lick High School soccer players in gray team shirts backstage during a Cal-Hi Sports TV segment.

photos.title: Behind the Scenes at Media Day
photos.caption: Behind the scenes as a teammate is interviewed for Cal-Hi Sports Bay Area.
photos.alt: James Lick High School soccer players gathered near a Cal-Hi Sports TV microphone during a media day interview.

photos.title: Cal-Hi Sports Interview Segment
photos.caption: A teammate's on-camera interview for Cal-Hi Sports Bay Area's coverage of James Lick soccer.
photos.alt: Cal-Hi Sports Bay Area TV interview segment with James Lick High School soccer players in the background.

photos.title: Humberto Solis Interview
photos.caption: Goalkeeper Humberto Solis being interviewed for Cal-Hi Sports Bay Area, teammates looking on.
photos.alt: Cal-Hi Sports TV lower-third graphic naming Humberto Solis, James Lick High School senior goalkeeper, with teammates in the background.

photos.title: James Lick Soccer Shirt Close-Up
photos.caption: A closer look at the James Lick Soccer team shirt during the Cal-Hi Sports media day segment.
photos.alt: James Lick High School Soccer team shirt in the foreground with teammates visible behind during a Cal-Hi Sports TV interview.
